scripts.kill-ports: bash -lc 'for port in 8780 5180 8080; do lsof -ti :"$port"; done | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true; echo "Ports cleared"'
scripts.dev: pnpm run kill-ports && pnpm exec concurrently -n api,frontend,landing -c green,blue,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm run -F=api dev" "pnpm run -F=frontend dev" "pnpm run -F=landing dev"
scripts.dev:telegram: pnpm run kill-ports && pnpm exec concurrently -n api,frontend,tunnel -c green,blue,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "pnpm run -F=api dev" "pnpm run -F=frontend dev" "pnpm run -F=api tunnel"
scripts.dead-code: concurrently -n knip,slop-api,slop-frontend -c magenta,green,blue "knip --reporter compact" "slop-scan scan packages/api --lint | tee /dev/stderr | grep -q '^0 findings$'" "slop-scan scan packages/frontend --lint | tee /dev/stderr | grep -q '^0 findings$'"
scripts.detect-unused-methods: concurrently -n api,frontend -c green,blue "node detect-unused-methods.mjs packages/api" "node detect-unused-methods.mjs packages/frontend"
